headline: Morgan Stanley Cuts General Mills (GIS) Forecast Again Amid Inflation Concerns
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $2.23 billion, General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 5, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) to $32 from $37. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The analyst said attention is shifting toward […]

headline: How General Mills’ New COO Amid Profit Pressures Will Impact General Mills (GIS) Investors
summary: General Mills recently reported ongoing pressure on unit sales and profitability over the past two years, alongside expectations for a 1.1% sales decline over the next 12 months and a forward P/E ratio of 10.1x. At the same time, investors appear to be repositioning around the appointment of a new chief operating officer and the upcoming late-June earnings release, suggesting leadership changes are becoming a key focus amid these business headwinds. With investors reacting to the new chief...
